answer: \boxed{Eroshka viewed Olenin’s love for drinking as a sign of camaraderie and shared it as part of their friendship, appreciating his willingness to embrace Cossack traditions. He saw it as a mark of Olenin’s genuine connection to their way of life, rather than a flaw. However, Eroshka’s affection for Olenin ultimately faded, as seen when he quickly returned to his normal routine after Olenin left.}
